Schools, hospitals, and mallssupermarkets are all within walking distance, making it an ideal neighborhood for families. Public transport is readily available with buses and autos at your doorstep, ensuring smooth connectivity. Banks and ATMs are located just 100 meters away for quick financial access, while the local railway station is a short 1.5 to 2 km drive. The upcoming metro station will further enhance connectivity, making this area a prime choice for residents.
